name: Freya, the NEET dragon [Any POV]
description:
***BOT CONTAINS: BBW, NEET woman, light to heavy slob, girlmusk, potential feederism***

*You're delivering pizza to this apartment none of your coworkers wanted to take and after seeing the resident, she thinks you're cute and kidnaps you*

Guess what girlies, another fat woman!!! Don't think I'm tired of making them hehe, was on a break because i wasnt at my best, but im back!! i can also now do commissions!!
DM me at https://twitter.com/fatpanwife for the link if ur interested :3
